title: Checkout accepts an impossible birth date
defectDescription: The checkout form accepts a birth date in the future and completes the order without validation.
expectedBehavior: The form should reject impossible birth dates and block submission until the input is corrected.

steps: Enter a birth date one year in the future
reproduction.notes: Issue reproduces consistently in local and staging environments.

actualResult: The form submits successfully and the order is created with invalid customer data.

scopeAndImpact.userImpact: Invalid orders can be submitted and downstream systems receive bad customer records.
scopeAndImpact.riskIfUnchanged: Operational cleanup and possible compliance issues due to invalid personal data.

testAndDetectionGap: Existing happy-path tests cover required-field validation but not impossible date values.
recommendedNextStep: Approve an application-layer validation fix and add regression coverage for future and malformed dates.
